target_notes: SoccerNet is a research dataset of 500+ full soccer matches with action-spotting, replay-grounding, and player-tracking annotations (Giancola et al. CVPR 2018; Cioppa et al. CVPR 2022). The full dataset is hundreds of GB of video; annotations require accepting an NDA and using the SoccerNet Downloader with a password. case_001 captures only the public schema files from the sn-spotting GitHub repo: the 17 action class labels, 3 team-affiliation labels, 3 visibility labels, and the canonical splits enum from SoccerNet/utils.py. case_002 may add a real annotated game once the gated download path is wired.
capture_method: GET 4 raw GitHub files: classes.txt (17 action classes + 'I don't know'), second_classes.txt (team affiliation), third_classes.txt (visibility), and utils.py (canonical splits list). Total persisted ~6.4 KB. The video corpus + annotation JSONs are gated behind soccer-net.org's NDA-style download flow with password authentication; this fixture validates schema-level invariants only.
